regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces an intensifying multi-front crisis with three US carrier groups implementing a comprehensive global blockade while the regime experiences unprecedented internal fracture between negotiation-seeking civilians and hardline military commanders resisting talks, compounded by massive domestic protests and security force defections.
regime_fall.last_major_event: On June 16, 2026, the IDF struck Iranian regime security institutions and the Shahran oil depot near Tehran, while Iran launched approximately 30 ballistic missiles targeting Haifa in Operation True Promise III with 92% interception rates, and Supreme Leader Khamenei appointed Maj. Gen. Amir Hatami as Artesh commander; concurrently, three US carrier groups implemented a global blockade with Trump administration declaring an 'ironclad' embargo and direct diplomatic negotiations underway via US envoys.
